title: Ironclad Entity
description: Schema for an Ironclad Entity — a counterparty, internal party, or referenced organization/person that is linked to workflows, records, and obligations. Surfaced via /entities under the Ironclad Public API.

type.description: Entity type — e.g., company, person, vendor, customer.

schemaId.description: Identifier of the Entities schema defining this entity's metadata fields.

properties.description: Free-form metadata properties for the entity. Field structure is governed by the entity's schema.

relationships.description: Typed relationships to other entities (parent/child, subsidiary, signatory-of, etc.).
